channel.title: Model Serving on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Model Serving on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Open AI GPT-5.6 on Azure Databricks
item.description:
OpenAI GPT-5.6 is now generally available on Azure Databricks. Customers can use GPT 5.6 purchased through Microsoft Foundry via a Model Serving Endpoint in Azure Databricks.

  • Source: Azure Updates
